name: TitanCoreWorkflows
description: Pre-built AI workflows provided by TitanCore. Includes the standard RAG pipeline, tool-execution pipeline, and embedding ingestion workflow.

workflows.name: TitanCore RAG Workflow
workflows.description: Standard Retrieval-Augmented Generation workflow. Embeds the user query, searches the vector store for relevant chunks, injects context into the LLM prompt, and returns a grounded, citation-aware response.

steps.name: guardrail_check
steps.description: Evaluate input against configured guardrail rules before proceeding.

steps.name: query_embedding
steps.description: Embed the user query using the configured embedding provider.

steps.name: vector_search
steps.description: Search the vector store for the top-k most similar document chunks.

steps.name: context_injection
steps.description: Inject retrieved chunks into the LLM prompt using the RAG context prompt template.

steps.name: llm_completion
steps.description: Run LLM chat completion with the enriched prompt.

steps.name: citation_resolution
steps.description: Map LLM output back to source document references.

workflows.name: TitanCore Tool Execution Workflow
workflows.description: Secure tool execution workflow. Runs the allowlist check, permission gate, input validation, and timeout-guarded handler invocation with full audit logging.

steps.name: allowlist_check
steps.description: Verify the requested tool is in the configured allowlist.

steps.name: manifest_lookup
steps.description: Resolve the tool handler class from the registered manifest.

steps.name: permission_gate
steps.description: Run the optional permission checker callable against the current context.

steps.name: input_validation
steps.description: Validate input parameters against the declared input schema.

steps.name: dry_run_check
steps.description: Return a no-side-effect response when context.dry_run is true.

steps.name: handler_execution
steps.description: Invoke the handler class with timeout guard (SIGALRM when available).

steps.name: audit_write
steps.description: Record the execution attempt (pass or fail) via the configured audit writer.

workflows.name: TitanCore Embedding Ingestion Workflow
workflows.description: Batch document ingestion workflow. Chunks documents, generates embeddings, and upserts vectors into the configured vector store.
workflows.note: Dedicated workflow contract for embedding ingestion and vector-store upserts.

steps.name: document_chunking
steps.description: Split source documents into fixed-size or semantic chunks.

steps.name: batch_embedding
steps.description: Generate embeddings for each chunk using the configured embedding provider.

steps.name: vector_upsert
steps.description: Upsert chunk vectors and metadata into the vector store.

steps.name: knowledge_sync
steps.description: Optionally sync the new knowledge base snapshot via SyncTitanDocsKnowledgeCommand.
